misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, representing Hirsala Golf, stands as a seasoned and distinctive competitor within the annals of the Hector Trophée. The forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026 will mark his eleventh appearance in this prestigious pair competition, underscoring a commitment that has seen him become a fixture on the greens.

Over his ten prior participations, Simo has carved out a notable legacy within the team format, having triumphantly claimed the coveted Hector Trophée on three distinct occasions. These victories highlight his exceptional ability to coalesce with partners and execute under pressure, though the individual Victor Trophy remains an ambition yet unfulfilled in his distinguished career.

Known for his intensely focused and at times overtly expressive demeanor on the course, Simo's passionate engagement with the game is undeniable. This unyielding pursuit of excellence was further exemplified by his adoption of a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season, a strategic adjustment reflecting his continuous quest for precision. As he prepares for his eleventh challenge, Simo remains a compelling figure, constantly striving to conquer both the team and individual dimensions of the tournament.
